message.content:
@startuml
actor Administrator
participant ":Main UI" as MainUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileUI" as ImportReadingsFromFileUI
participant ":ImportReadingsFromFileController" as ImportReadingsFromFileController
participant ":ListOfGeographicArea" as ListOfGeographicArea
participant "reader:XmlReader" as XmlReader

Administrator -> ImportReadingsFromFileUI: Request file path
ImportReadingsFromFileUI --> Administrator: file path
ImportReadingsFromFileUI -> ImportReadingsFromFileController: addReadingsToSensors(reader,path)
activate ImportReadingsFromFileController
ImportReadingsFromFileController -> XmlReader: importReadingsOfSensor(path)
activate XmlReader
XmlReader --> ImportReadingsFromFileController: listOfReadingsDto
deactivate XmlReader
ImportReadingsFromFileController -> ListOfGeographicArea: getAllSensors()
activate ListOfGeographicArea
ListOfGeographicArea --> ImportReadingsFromFileController: listOfAreaSensors
deactivate ListOfGeographicArea
ImportReadingsFromFileController -> ImportReadingsFromFileController: setReadingsBySensorIDescription()
ImportReadingsFromFileController --> ImportReadingsFromFileUI: number of lines added
deactivate ImportReadingsFromFileController
ImportReadingsFromFileUI --> Administrator: number of lines added
@enduml
